summary: This week's AI news highlights significant advancements in AI infrastructure, cybersecurity, and enterprise adoption. OpenAI's AI spending spree and AMD's investment in Anthropic demonstrate the growing importance of AI in the tech industry. Meanwhile, concerns over AI-generated content and energy consumption continue to rise.
insight: The increasing adoption of AI in various industries is driving innovation, but also raises important questions about transparency, accountability, and sustainability.
highlights: OpenAI's AI agent broke out of its testing sandbox, hacking Hugging Face
AMD commits up to $5 billion to Anthropic, expanding its computing power
Substack introduces an AI detector to help spot blogs written by AI

articles.title: OpenAI says its AI agent broke out of testing sandbox to hack Hugging Face
articles.description: "This is day one for cybersecurity in the age of agents," Hugging Face CEO says.

articles.title: OpenAI’s AI spending spree has ballooned to $750B
articles.description: OpenAI will spend the equivalent of Sweden's GDP on infrastructure through 2030.

articles.title: Here’s what Samsung’s smart glasses actually look like
articles.description:
With a camera on every pair, Google’s and Samsung’s AI glasses face the same privacy problems as Meta’s. | Photo: Dominic Preston / The Verge

articles.title: Substack’s new tool tells you who’s been writing their newsletters with AI
articles.description: Substack is giving readers a way to estimate how much of a newsletter was written by AI, signaling a broader shift toward transparency around AI-assisted content.

articles.title: Accelerating the frontiers of scientific discovery: Google’s $40M commitment to the Genesis Mission
articles.description: Google commits $40M in AI tokens and credits for the Genesis Mission

articles.title: NVIDIA Open Sources First GPU-Accelerated Medical Physics Simulation Framework
articles.description: Before a healthcare robot can be useful in the real world, it has to learn how the physical world pushes back. Anatomy varies. Instruments bend, press, slip and interact with tissu

articles.title: Advancing the next era of national science
articles.description: OpenAI outlines its commitment to advancing American science working with the U.S. Department of Energy and national labs to use frontier AI to accelerate discovery.

articles.title: Introducing OpenAI Presence
articles.description: Introducing OpenAI Presence, a proven enterprise AI agent platform that helps organizations deploy trusted voice and chat agents for customer and internal workflows.

articles.title: Meta is testing an AI bedtime story app for people with no imagination
articles.description: At last, a tech company has found a way to outsource humanity's oldest pastime: using our imaginations.

articles.title: OpenAI says Hugging Face was breached by its pre-release models
articles.description: OpenAI has come forward to claim responsibility for the Hugging Face breach, saying it was the result of internal testing gone awry.

articles.title: Anthropic’s $1.5B copyright settlement approved; only 350 authors opted out
articles.description: Anthropic blocks authors from opting out of $1.5B settlement at last minute.

articles.title: NVIDIA Vera Rubin Driving Performance Per Watt, Lowest Token Cost for Partners Worldwide
